boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on hazard-control status
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Pending controls block closure per STD-AST-081-P

final_answer: Action may not proceed. REL-AST-081 shows active cabinet/handler controls pending for AS-44 solvent. STD-AST-081-P requires exact hazard-control status match on material, quantity, facility, PO, and controls before execution. Boundary remains open; escalate for resolution of abstract-field trap.
